description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named win10 that builds a project on Windows 10 with Qt6. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test with Qt 6.5.3 on Windows 2022. It checks out the repository, caches and installs Qt, creates a build directory, builds the project using qmake, cmake, and make, and then packages the build artifacts. Finally, it archives the artifacts and uploads them as a release.
